data.message: Comments sent. The agent is reviewing them now.

Splitting the worker into 4 pools by concern: pdf-sealing (CPU), webhook-delivery (retry-heavy I/O), audit (compliance-critical, isolated), and notifications (email + reminders). Applying the change to the plan now; architecture artifacts and diagram will rebuild after plan approval.

Plan file updated with the four-pool worker split (pdf-sealing, webhook-delivery, audit, notifications). Architecture artifacts (model.yaml, view-component-worker.yaml, view-deployment.yaml, summary.md) and the rerendered diagram are blocked behind plan approval — Plan Mode is currently read-only on everything except the plan file. Approve the plan to unblock the artifact rebuild.
